channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
item.description: [BBC Technology] However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI is delivering its clearest ROI so far not in marketing, but in fraud, where criminals are scaling persuasion faster and more effectively than most businesses. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale
item.description: [MarTech] ActiveCampaign’s new AI tools alert you to what’s working in your campaigns and beyond and how to fix what isn’t — no prompting required. The post ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Amazon's Alexa has had an AI upgrade. Now she's got more to say
item.description: [BBC Technology] There has been criticism the Echo has stagnated, while other AI chatbots have become much easier to communicate with.

item.title: Crimson Desert dev apologizes for use of AI art
item.description: [The Verge AI] Reviews of Crimson Desert have been mixed, but the bigger issue for the game has been the discovery of what appeared to be AI-generated assets in the final release. Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced

item.title: Musk says he’s building a Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
item.description: [The Verge AI] Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies. Musk has expressed concern, as have othe

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
item.description: [BBC Technology] Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

item.title: I Tried DoorDash’s Tasks App and Saw the Bleak Future of AI Gig Work
item.description: [WIRED AI] I recorded videos of myself doing laundry, scrambling eggs, and walking around the park in DoorDash’s new Tasks app, where gig workers are paid to train AI.

item.title: Cyberattack on a Car Breathalyzer Firm Leaves Drivers Stuck
item.description: [WIRED AI] Plus: The FBI admits it’s buying phone data to track Americans, Iranian hackers disrupt medical care at Maryland hospitals, and more.

item.title: 'Jury Duty Presents: Company Retreat' Almost Makes Corporate Culture Seem Fun
item.description: [WIRED AI] The Amazon Prime prank series amplifies the hijinks of workplace dynamics, while showing how people find purpose—and community—in their jobs despite impossible situations.

item.title: Anthropic Denies It Could Sabotage AI Tools During War
item.description: [WIRED AI] The Department of Defense alleges the AI developer could manipulate models in the middle of war. Company executives argue that’s impossible.

item.title: US stocks rally after Trump postpones strikes on Iran’s power plants
item.description: [Straits Times] Dow Jones rose 1.38 per cent, while S&P gained 1.15 per cent and Nasdaq Composite gained 1.38 per cent, to 21,946.76.

item.title: Hyundai recalls 58,000 Palisade SUVs in South Korea due to automatic seat problem
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Crunchyroll probes breach after hacker steal users data, BleepingComputer reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

item.title: Google’s new Pixel 10 ads made me go ‘Wait, WHAT are they trying to sell?’
item.description: [The Verge AI] Ever watch a TV ad and wonder, "How did this get approved?" Today, Google has not one but two new ad spots for its six-month-old Pixel 10 phones, and… let's just say they may not come across as intended. First, there's "With 100x Zoom," an ad that appears to suggest that if a vacation rental [&#8230

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says ‘I think we’ve achieved AGI’
item.description: [The Verge AI] On a Monday episode of the Lex Fridman podcast, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang made a hot-button statement: "I think we've achieved AGI." AGI, or artificial general intelligence, is a vaguely defined term that has incited a lot of discussion by tech CEOs, tech workers, and the general public in recent year

item.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman exits Helion Energy's board as firms explore partnership
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

item.title: Oil slides, stocks rebound on Trump's Iran remarks
item.description: [CNA Tech] US President Donald Trump said the US and Iran had held "productive conversations” aimed at ending the conflict in the Middle East, though Tehran denied any talks.

item.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

item.title: Apple to hold annual developers conference from June 8
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: AI may boost euro area productivity growth by 4% in 10 years, ECB says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

item.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

item.title: Will AI end SEO?
item.description: [MarTech] From prompt engineering to data quality, SEO still depends on human input — even with AI's expanding capabilities. The post Will AI end SEO? appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 中微半导1.6亿“捡漏”IPO折戟标的，MCU龙头开启存储芯片补位战
item.description: [钛媒体] 存储大年，中微半导抓紧上车。

item.title: How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing
item.description: [MarTech] Embedding AI into marketing workflows promises big efficiency and performance gains — but you’ll need the right ROI models to justify the investment. The post How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Confronting the CEO of the AI company that impersonated me
item.description: [The Verge AI] Today, I’m talking with Shishir Mehrotra, who is CEO of Superhuman — that’s the company formerly known as Grammarly, which is still its flagship product.  Shishir also used to be the chief product officer at YouTube, and he’s on the board of directors at Spotify. He’s a fascinating guy, and we

item.title: 氪星晚报 ｜阿里明日或将发布重要芯片产品；全球首个脑机接口创新产品获得医保编码；LG电子称今年将全力推进机器人业务
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 双林股份港股上市获中国证监会备案 36氪获悉，中国证监会国际合作司发布关于双林股份有限公司境外发行上市备案通知书，公司拟发行不超过89,697,300股境外上市普通股并在香港联合交易所上市。 宝盖新材料港股IPO获中国证监会备案 36氪获悉，中国证监会国际合作司发布关于山东宝盖新材料科技股份有限公司境外发行上市备案通知书，公司拟发行不超过16,640,500股境外上市普通股并在香港联合交易所上市。 云天化：2025年净利润51.56亿元，拟每10股派12元 36氪获悉，云天化发布2025年业绩报告。报告显示，公司2025年实现营业收入484.15亿元，同比下降

item.title: 36氪AI测评小程序重磅上线！帮你pick最适合自己的AI神器！
item.description:
[36氪] 这个春天，一打开手机，全网似乎都开始“养龙虾”了。 只是从“养龙虾”再到“卸龙虾”，AI应用圈的的变化速度超乎想象。 AI应用大批涌现的当下，跟风实在易踩坑。 AI遍地走，到底谁靠谱？ 别急，36氪AI测评来帮你！
01 36氪AI测评小程序，正式上线啦！
⬆️扫码体验36氪AI测评小程序⬆️ 其实，36氪早就上线了AI测评网（网页版），被大家戏称为“AI应用领域的大众点评”。 现在，小程序版也正式来了！ 微信里搜一搜，就能打开这个“AI应用百宝箱”，通勤摸鱼都能刷，随时随地帮你找到顺手的AI工具。
36氪AI测评小程序-首页 正如

item.title: 重生之传统文娱人：手握AI成为行业1%
item.description: [钛媒体] 让我们走进这两位传统影视创作者的AI重生故事……

item.title: 我的“一人公司”，是怎么搞钱的？
item.description: [钛媒体] AI给了每个人杠杆，但不是每个人都能用好。

item.title: Singapore stocks fall in line with regional bourses; STI down 2.2%
item.description: [Straits Times] Across the broader market, gainers trailed losers 144 to 554.

item.title: 硬氪首发 | 前华为自动驾驶核心成员创业，要做“会走路”的情绪陪伴机器人
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 林晴晴 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，情绪陪伴场景小型具身机器人公司「青心意创」已于近期完成Pre-A轮融资，本轮融资由厚雪资本和天际资本领投，老股东乐朴资本持续跟投，新辉资本担任长期财务顾问。本轮融资将主要用于超小型双足陪伴机器人的产品研发及技术平台搭建、核心算法迭代与团队扩充。此前，公司已完成由初心资本、乐朴资本及多位科技领域个人投资者参与的天使轮融资。 「青心意创」核心团队于2024年初组建，将前沿的具身智能以及自动驾驶大小脑协同软硬件等全栈技术能力应用于陪伴机器人的研发与探索，在全球率先实现了直膝行走，并首创强化学习“情绪步态

item.title: MiniMax上市61天市值越过百度，AI新贵掀翻旧牌桌
item.description: [钛媒体] 掀翻互联网牌桌的人。

item.title: 在线音乐只顾着防御汽水，却快被AI“抄家”了
item.description: [钛媒体] 谁又敢保证，未来用户不会觉得AI比人类制造的内容更高级呢？

item.title: Cursor被抓包“套壳”再反转：数百亿美元估值的美国AI独角兽，新底牌竟是Kimi
item.description: [钛媒体] 一场“自研”神话的破灭，只用了不到三小时。

item.title: Meet the Gods of AI Warfare
item.description: [WIRED AI] In its early days, the AI initiative known as Project Maven had its fair share of skeptics at the Pentagon. Today, many of them are true believers.

item.title: 36氪报告图解 | 这条AI赛道，2026年规模有望破万亿
item.description: [36氪] 近期，36氪研究发布了《2026年具身智能产业发展研究报告》（以下简称“报告”）。报道提到，截至2025年12月21日，全年融资事件超305起，总额超过380亿元，参与的投资机构数量超过600家。资本的密集涌入，充分印证了产业发展的潜力与市场信心。 从技术成熟度、产业链完备度与市场拓展速度来看，中国具身智能产业已处于全球第一梯队。根据36氪研究院测算，中国具身智能市场规模已从2018年的2133亿元迅速增长至2025年的9150亿元，并有望在2026年突破万亿元关口。并且，商业化落地节奏也在日趋加快，具身智能应用持续向工业领域、服务领域、特种领域、交通出行领域等下游场景渗透。 报告预计

item.title: 提供高质量空间智能数据服务，「际数科技」完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资 | 36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，高质量空间智能数据服务商际数科技宣布完成数千万元pre-A+轮融资。本轮融资由庚智基金投资，资金主要用于底层技术平台研发、数据资产拓展及市场推广。 际数科技成立于2023年5月，旨在以“数据自动化标注数据”新范式，为自动驾驶、具身智能等领域提供核心数据基座，解决空间智能数据供给矛盾。目前公司产品重点落地自动驾驶领域，已服务超过20家头部智能驾驶行业客户。 际数科技创始人兼CEO周源为武汉大学测绘工程博士与同济大学测绘与地理信息博士后，在自动驾驶感知数据、测绘与地理信息领域深耕多年，曾参与制定国家标准GB/T41450-2022，获得自然资源部科技进步奖1项、上海市级奖项3项

item.title: 打造青少年“AI私教”，走进全国200多所学校，「满分运动」获数千万元A轮融资｜36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，全场景体育教育服务商「满分运动」近期宣布完成数千万元A轮融资。本轮融资由顺禧基金与深圳市龙华区龙华资本联合投资，投后估值达数亿元。资金将主要用于C端市场拓展、技术研发与团队扩充。 满分运动聚焦于青少年体育教育及全年龄段运动健康领域，基于自研的全国首款青少年运动健康垂类“飞驰大模型”与智能体“小满老师”，以及与视频与视觉技术国家工程研究中心合作研发的视觉捕捉模型，目前构建起从学校到家庭、覆盖室内与户外场景的完整产品矩阵，已被评为国家级高新技术企业。 满分运动创始人周寅猛的身上有着少见的复合标签和跨界经历：国家一级运动员、U17国青队队员、北京大学管理学博士、北京体育大学博士后

item.title: Grab to buy Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda Taiwan business for $770 million
item.description: [Straits Times] The deal marks Grab's first foray into food delivery outside of its South-east Asia home market.

item.title: The AI Race Is Pressuring Utilities to Squeeze More From Europe’s Power Grids
item.description: [WIRED AI] As data center developers queue up to connect to power grids across Europe, network operators are experimenting with novel ways of clearing room for them.

item.title: Puma fails to block registration of Tiger Woods-backed Sun Day Red trademark in Singapore
item.description: [Straits Times] At the heart of the dispute was whether Sun Day Red’s tiger logo was too similar to Puma’s iconic leaping cat.

item.title: AI commoditizes marketing execution and elevates judgment
item.description: [MarTech] Marketing teams risk flooding channels with low-quality AI slop. Learn how to balance speed with strategy and protect brand integrity. The post AI commoditizes marketing execution and elevates judgment appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: South Korea’s early exports show resilience despite Iran turmoil
item.description: [Straits Times] Semiconductors continued to drive South Korea’s overall shipments, soaring nearly 164 per cent.

item.title: Asia stocks plunge, gold wipes out 2026 gains as Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum
item.description: [Straits Times] The escalating Middle East conflict has deepened global inflation fears.

item.title: AI influencer awards season is upon us
item.description: [The Verge AI] First came the AI beauty pageant. Then the AI music contests. Now, there is an award for AI Personality of the Year - perhaps the inevitable next step for the AI influencer economy as it fights for legitimacy amid an onslaught of AI slop and grifters and transforms from quirky novelty into a serious

item.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
item.description: [BBC Technology] The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

item.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
item.description: [BBC Technology] The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

item.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
item.description: [BBC Technology] Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

item.title: Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website
item.description: [MarTech] Walmart’s test shows AI-driven checkout may simplify buying, but it still converts far worse than traditional ecommerce experiences. The post Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico marks a rare startup exit in Vietnam
